errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later

oauth.access_denied: You cancelled signing in with {{provider}}. Please try again or use another method.
oauth.redirect_uri_mismatch: There's a configuration issue with {{provider}}. Please contact us.
oauth.invalid_request: The request to {{provider}} is invalid. Please try again in a few minutes.
oauth.unauthorized_client: Our application isn't authorized with {{provider}}. Please contact us.
oauth.unsupported_response_type: There's a technical issue with {{provider}}. Please contact us.
oauth.invalid_scope: The permissions requested from {{provider}} aren't valid. Please contact us.
oauth.server_error: {{provider}} is having issues. Please try again in a few minutes.
oauth.temporarily_unavailable: {{provider}} is currently unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
oauth.oauth_state_mismatch: Your session expired during sign-in. Please try again.
oauth.unknown: We couldn't complete sign-in with {{provider}}. Please try again later.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet security requirements

confirmation.title: Sign out?
confirmation.description: Are you sure you want to sign out?

signin.title: Sign In
signin.description: Sign in to your Hospeda account to access your bookings and favorites

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.description: Create your Hospeda account to manage your bookings and discover new accommodations

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Recover your Hospeda password. We will send you a link to reset your password

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your Hospeda account

expired.title: This link has expired
expired.description: Reset links have a short lifespan for your security. Request a new one and try again.

invalid.title: This link is no longer valid
invalid.description: It may have already been used or modified. Request a new link to continue.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.description: Verifying your email address on Hospeda
